technical: How would you evaluate a retrieval pipeline before shipping it to users?

system_design: Design a scalable document question-answering system for enterprise customers.
How would you design observability for an LLM application with tool calls?
What architecture would you use for model fallback under latency constraints?
behavioral: Tell me about a time your model looked good offline but failed in production.
Describe a situation where you had to explain model limitations to non-technical stakeholders.
Tell me about a time you pushed back on a risky AI release.
hr: Why are you interested in this AI role specifically?
What kind of AI product team helps you do your best work?
How do you keep your AI knowledge current without chasing every trend?
mixed: What is one AI project you are most proud of, and why?
How do you balance experimentation speed with production reliability?
What signals tell you an AI feature is not ready to launch?
